lesson_text: A source sends water through a channel; a narrowed throat adds resistance; downstream output declines while upstream backlog grows.
People arrive at a desk, pass one review lane, and wait when the lane constricts arrivals to later appointments.
Events originate at producers, enter a broker route, meet a throttled consumer, and pile before downstream handling.
Bins enter a packing path, a metered label step limits passage, and finished kits leave in a trickle.
Trays move along a counter passage, a single payment throat limits passage, and diners wait before seating.
Jobs originate at workstations, pass through a spool route, and emerge in bursts when release is metered.
Samples enter accessioning, move through a handoff lane, and starve analysis benches when verification narrows.
Travelers gather at a gate, enter a boarding lane, and seats fill slowly when a document pinch restricts passage.
Parcels enter from docks, use one sort aisle, and leave irregularly when a chute meters passage.
Riders start at a concourse, pass a stair throat, and arrive sparsely at the platform when the throat narrows.
Tickets originate from users, pass through a routing board, and reach agents sparsely when approval constrains passage.
Orders originate in a kitchen, use a runner route, and reach tables late when checkout becomes the choke point.
A disk turns around a center socket; rising friction at the socket makes the turn rough and eventually stuck.
A ring pivots on a yoke; grit at the pivot adds drag and makes the sweep jerky.
A roller turns under cartons; dry contact in an end cup grinds and cartons hesitate.
A selector ring revolves in a small socket; abrasion grows and the dial sticks between settings.
A stage wheel circles on a journal seat; drag rises and fine adjustment locks.
A turnstile arm rotates around a center journal; rough contact vibrates and the arm stops mid-cycle.
A joint ring turns in a cup; abrasive dust increases drag and the arm hesitates.
A valve rotor turns against a seat ring; rough contact warms and the valve locks shut.
An azimuth plate circles on a base race; dust creates grinding and tracking wobbles.
A rewinder core turns on a hub seat; rough contact warms and roll travel lurches.
A pointer spindle turns in a tiny jewel seat; grit adds drag and the pointer freezes.
A lamp yoke swivels in side bushings; dry contact squeals and the sweep stalls.
A panel imposes burden on a frame; rails should share demand, but one lug receives most and the frame creases.
Performers add burden to deck panels; ribs distribute it until one rib takes local demand and the deck warps.
Equipment mass sits on shelf rails; one rear lug takes excess demand and the rack face cants.
Plant trays add mass to bench slats; one slat receives local demand and the tray line dips.
Wind pushes a panel; frame bars distribute demand until one fastener lug takes most and wrinkles spread.
Hull mass rests across pads; one pad takes point demand and the hull skin dents.
Array mass sits across rails; one clamp lug takes excess demand and the edge drops.
Speaker mass sits on a platform; one cross rib takes most burden and the surface creases.
Wet fabric adds burden; the frame spreads demand until a front lug is singled out and the corner sags.
Glassware mass rests on a tray; side rails share demand until one rail takes most and the tray bows.
Bikes impose burden; rack arms share demand until one weld lug takes excess and the arm bends.
Sample mass hangs from pegs; the backboard spreads demand until one peg point takes most and the board splits.
